{{Quote|The ''Selu'' has been renamed the ''{{'}}Venix{{'}}'' by Aeron to enable her to sneak into the Viraxo Cargo Facility at Denbo, masquerading as one of their regular suppliers.|Azzameen family [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]] briefs Ace Azzameen on their mission to sabotage Viraxo Industries|audio=EmkayVenix-XWA.flac|<ref name="SWXWA" />}}
The '''''Venix''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that made regular deliveries for [[Viraxo Industries]]. Sometime after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="SWXWA" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Viraxo Industries attempted to [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] their rivals, the [[Azzameen family|Azzameen-owned]] [[Merchant/Legends|shipping]] company [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]]. In [[Raid on Viraxo 54|retribution]], [[Antan Azzameen]], co-owner of Twin Suns Transport Services, instructed his [[Gender/Legends|niece]] [[Aeron Azzameen]] to install the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Selu]]'' with fake [[Transponder code/Legends|transponder codes]] to pass off that [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] as the ''Venix''.<ref name="SWXWA" />

As part of the plan, Aeron prepared to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] the ''Selu'', now renamed the ''Venix'', to a [[Viraxo 54|Viraxo Industries facility]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Denbo]]. There, they then would have the renamed ''Venix'' drop off a [[Class-L cargo container|Class-L]] [[Xizor cargo container|cargo container]] containing contraband [[Spice/Legends|spice]] retrieved from the Viraxo's sabotage of the [[Azzameen cargo fields]]. The plan failed, however, and Aeron's brother [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] was forced to destroy the renamed ''Selu'' in order to hide the Azzameens' involvement in the raid.<ref name="SWXWA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Venix'' was first mentioned in the [[1999]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', developed by [[Totally Games]].<ref name="SWXWA" />
